name: fastsearch
description: VS Code extension for fast workspace symbol indexing and navigation.

fastIndexer.enabled.description: Enable or disable Fast Symbol Indexer local commands and future background indexing work.

fastIndexer.include.description: Glob patterns to include when scanning workspace files.

fastIndexer.exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from workspace indexing in addition to built-in heavy-path filters.

fastIndexer.ignoreFiles.description: Paths to .gitignore-style rule files resolved relative to each workspace folder. Each entry is loaded once per folder and merged with built-in exclusions and fastIndexer.exclude.

fastIndexer.sharedIgnoreFiles.description: Paths to .gitignore-style rule files resolved once for the current workspace as a whole. In multi-root workspaces these are workspace-level shared inputs rather than per-folder entries.

fastIndexer.maxFileSizeKb.description: Maximum file size in KB to include when indexing workspace files.

fastIndexer.debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before refreshing the index after workspace changes.

fastIndexer.symbolFallback.description: Allow approximate symbol-index fallback candidates when provider-backed results are unavailable.

fastIndexer.providerFallback.description: Allow local index fallbacks when language providers cannot return usage or implementation results.

fastIndexer.fuzzySearch.description: Enable fuzzy-ranked matching for fast indexer command queries.

fastIndexer.completionStyleResults.description: Enable completion-style result narrowing and presentation in fast indexer commands.

fastIndexer.useRipgrep.description: Allow fast indexer commands to use ripgrep as an optional external search provider when available.

fastIndexer.useFzf.description: Allow fast indexer commands to use fzf as an optional interactive narrowing provider when available.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run compile && node ./dist/test/runTest.js
